arts.ttl: Barcelona readying €70m swoop for Liverpool star

arts.ttl: Barça confirm Camp Nou return delayed again
arts.sum: Barcelona have confirmed they will not return to Spotify Camp Nou before May as renovation work on the club's stadium drags on.

arts.ttl: Juventus target Araujo close to committing to Barcelona stay after Deco meeting
arts.sum: Juventus target Ronald Araujo is close to committing his long-term future to his current club...

arts.ttl: Barcelona Sporting Director Deco to take legal action over Vitor Roque comments
arts.sum: Barcelona Sporting Director Deco has not taken kindly to comments made by ex-presidential candidate Victor Font, and plans to take legal action against him. Font insinuated that there was underhand business afoot during the deal to take Vitor Roque to the club during an interview this week. As per MD, Deco has decided to take […] The post Barcelona Sporting Director Deco to take legal action over Vitor Roque comments appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Chelsea star embroiled in Barcelona corruption allegations
arts.sum: Chelsea striker Marc Guiu has found himself unwittingly caught in the crossfire of Barcelona ’s political turmoil that have seen sporting director indirectly accused of corruption at Camp Nou. “We have Marc Guiu, we were struggling financially and we signed Vitor Roque,” Font told RAC1 .

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Premier League duo ready to battle for former wonderkid?
arts.sum: Former Barcelona wonderkid Ansu Fati is allegedly attracting interest from two Premier League clubs during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Neymar says Mbappe was jealous of Messi at PSG and reveals his real reasons for leaving Barcelona
arts.sum: Neymar had a chat with Romario in which he spoke about his difficult adaptation and subsequent departure from Barcelona ('the escape of the century'), his talks with Lionel Messi at the Camp Nou and his relationship with Kylian Mbappe at Paris Saint-Germain . Then Messi knocks on the door and asks me why I'm crying, I told him it was nothing, he said he was there to help me and that I should play the football I played at Santos, without pressure.
